channel.title: Computers on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Computers on Zymacs

item.title: But what is a Computer?
item.description: While talking about what interview questions I’d been studying, I mentioned to a non technical friend how interesting it was finding questions so basic included. Why would you ask a Software Engineering graduate to define a computer? Such a waste of time right? My friend’s response was even more interesting: “What is a computer?” he posed the question to me. And there I was… answering my own question. Remember? “Why would you ask a Soft….”
